scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:mobile-web: npm run build:shared && npm run export:web -w mobile
scripts.verify: npm run build:shared && npm run -w api build && npm run -w web lint && npm run -w web build && npm run typecheck -w mobile
